resume_hint: Phase 135 fix: aq-insights was reading answer_relevance_avg/context_precision_avg from eval_trend dict, but those keys only exist when source==ragas (fallback path). When source==tool_audit, RAGAS data was always null in aq-insights. Fix: always include raw ragas_metrics in JSON snapshot; aq-insights reads from there. Coordinator shows AR=0.644, CP=1.0, 5 samples. Faithfulness null by design (RAGAS_FAITHFULNESS_ENABLED=false).
